tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  x4


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
Lookin' around the house, hidden behind the window and the door[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
Searchin' for signs of life but there's nobody home[/tab]

[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  x2

[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
Well, maybe I'm just too sure[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
Or maybe I'm just too frightened by the sound of it[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
Pieces of notes fall down but the letter said[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
Uh-huh, it was good living with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
Uh-huh, it was good ah-ah-ah[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
Uh-huh, it was good living with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
Uh-huh, it was good ah-ah-ah[/tab]


[Interlude]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
Good good good good[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
Good good[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
Sitting around the house, watchin' the sun trace shadows on the floor[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
Searchin' for signs of life but there's nobody home[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
Well, maybe I'll call or write you a letter[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Now maybe we'll see on the 4th of July[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
But I'm not too sure, and I'm not too proud[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Well, I'm not too sure and I'm not too proud to say[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
Uh-huh, it was good living with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
Uh-huh, it was good ah-ah-ah[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
Uh-huh, it was good living with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
Uh-huh, it was good ah-ah-ah[/tab]


[Solo]
[ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  x4


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
Uh-huh, it was good living with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
Uh-huh, it was good ah-ah-ah[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
Uh-huh, it was good living with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Uh-huh, it was good ah-ah-ah[/tab]


[Outro]
[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  x4
